summary: There is no evidence in the retrieved materials linking omaveloxolone to Nrf2 suppression or modulation. Although some agents are noted to influence Nrf2 pathways, including through activation rather than suppression, omaveloxolone-specific mechanisms remain unmentioned in these findings.
